nasb.text: The eleventh for the eleventh month was Benaiah the Pirathonite of the sons of Ephraim; and in his division were 24,000.

esv.text: Eleventh, for the eleventh month, was Benaiah of Pirathon, of the sons of Ephraim; in his division were 24,000.

cnv.text: 十一月第十一班的軍長是以法蓮子孫中的比拉頓人比拿雅，他那一班有二萬四千人。

ccb.text: 以法莲的子孙比拉顿人比拿雅负责第十一班，在十一月当值，他班内有两万四千人。
